title: GLM 5.2 is my new favorite model...
summary: GLM-5.2, an open-weights model by Z.ai with MIT licensing, ranks first on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index and outperforms GPT-4.5 on the GDPval benchmark. The video demonstrates GLM-5.2 excelling in web design tasks, beating Claude on Design Arena's leaderboard, with tests covering recreation of linear interfaces and full-stack dashboard generation.
writeup: This video covers GLM-5.2, an open-weights model from Z.ai released under the MIT license. It reports that GLM-5.2 ranks first on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index with a score of 51, beats GPT-4.5 on the GDPval benchmark, and takes the top spot on Design Arena's web design leaderboard ahead of Claude models. The significance is that an MIT-licensed open-weights model posts leading benchmark results across general intelligence and web design tasks.
